---
title: "Advanced Modelling and Data Analysis for Pharmaceutical Sciences"
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
---

This website is in support of the *Advanced Modelling and Data Analysis for Pharmaceutical Sciences* course for the Master Degree of Pharmacy at the University of Geneva. For more details, questions, and more course material, please refer to the corresponding Moodle page or reach out to the [team](contacts.qmd).

If you are not part of the course, please feel free to use this material freely, but the authors do not take any responsability or make any claim of correctness on the provided input files.

<ul class="linked-list">

  <li>
    <a href="introduction_terminal.qmd" aria-label="Terminal Introduction">
      <img class="thumb" src="images/icons/terminal.png" alt="An icon of a terminal.">
    </a>
    <p class="desc">
      <a class="title" href="introduction_terminal.qmd">Introduction to terminals</a><br>
      A brief introduction to unix/unix-like terminals and shells.
    </p>
  </li>

  <li>
    <a href="introduction_baobab.qmd" aria-label="Baobab Introduction">
      <img class="thumb" src="images/icons/hpc.png" alt="An icon representing HPC.">
    </a>
    <p class="desc">
      <a class="title" href="introduction_baobab.qmd">Introduction to Baobab and HPC</a><br>
      Introduction to few key concepts behind High Perfomance Computing (HPC) and Baobab, one of UniGe's HPCs.
    </p>
  </li>

  <li>
    <a href="/exercise_gpcr_stability/exercise_gpcr_stability_index.qmd" aria-label="GPCR stability">
      <img class="thumb" src="images/icons/gpcr_stable.png" alt="GPCR embedded in membrane.">
    </a>
    <p class="desc">
      <a class="title" href="exercise_gpcr_stability/exercise_gpcr_stability_index.qmd">Adhesion GPCR in membrane</a><br>
      Exam exercise on the dynamical behaviour of different models of an adhesion GPCR.
    </p>
  </li>

  <li>
    <a href="/exercise_malaria_targets/exercise_malaria_targets_index.qmd" aria-label="Malaria target">
      <img class="thumb" src="images/icons/malaria_target.png" alt="PKG with ligand.">
    </a>
    <p class="desc">
      <a class="title" href="/exercise_malaria_targets/exercise_malaria_targets_index.qmd">Malaria target with ligands</a><br>
      Exam exercise on APO and HOLO Protein kinase G systems.
    </p>
  </li>

</ul>
